title: Omitting the AOG trust anchor silently converts every guarded admin mutation into an unauthenticated bootstrap operation

evidence: Config accepts absent AOGD_OPENBAO_ADDR and AOGD_ANCHOR_PUBKEY
Daemon::start maps that state to None
require_admin with None reaches next.run without checks
all admin mutation routes remain mounted
proof_gap: No live cluster was modified; static control flow is complete and destructive mutation testing is unnecessary.

facts: daemon starts instead of refusing service
attacker reaches loopback locally or opted-in network bind
